parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='GENERATING', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'

UPDATE jobs SET status='WAITING_VIDEO_APPROVAL', video_url='{{ $('Send Video Preview').item.json.s3_uri || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_url }}', script_json = COALESCE(script_json, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('media_names', COALESCE(script_json->'media_names', '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('video_filename', '{{ $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_filename }}')), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id, video_url: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_url, video_filename: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.video_filename, channel_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.channel_id, user_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.user_id }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='FAILED', error_message='WF-12 HeyGen 실패: {{ $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.status }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.channel_id, text: '❌ 영상 생성에 실패했습니다.\nJob ID: ' + $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.job_id.substring(0,8) + '\n상태: ' + ($('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.error || $('HeyGen Create + Poll').item.json.status) }) }}
